descriptionText: Ketch Pilot house For Sale 2012The Elley Grey is a stunning 75ft Ketch Pilot House sailing yacht for sale, built in 2012 by Gaffers & Luggers in Mylor Creek, Falmouth, U.K. As the last and the largest pilot cutter from this yard, weighing 50 tons, she is a vessel of historical significance and craftsmanship. With only one owner, this yacht has been meticulously maintained, showcasing luxury and comfort ideal for both living aboard and global voyaging. She is fully equipped with 2 electric windlass and variable pitch feathering propeller and only 800 h of motor.The yacht comes fully equipped for ocean sailing, featuring a GRP hull, an Aluminium superstructure, and a teak-deck finish. It offers ample space with a beam of 5.79m, a draft of 2.74m, and an LOA of 22.86m. Inside, the Elley Grey houses five cabins, including an owner's cabin and guest accommodations, all with en-suite facilities, alongside amenities like central heating, air-conditioning, a navigation centre, and a well-equipped galley.The rigging is a ketch-cutter setup with a wooden mast, electric reefing system, and sails from 2021. Power comes from a Gardner 6LXBM engine with 800 hours, ensuring reliable cruising at speeds up to 9.5 knots. The yacht also includes modern navigational equipment, a 12Kva Northern Lights generator, extensive battery setup, and safety gear.Overall, the Ketch Pilot house For Sale 2012 represents a unique blend of traditional craftsmanship and modern convenience, making her ready for immediate cruising and comfortable living at sea.Elley Grey est un beau bateau ketch pilot de 75 pieds Ketch de 2012. Avec un seul propriétaire, il a été maintenu en très bon état et offre confort et luxe, parfait pour vivre ou voyager à travers le monde. Elley a été le dernier bateau de 50 tonnes ayant le plus grand pilot cutter à quitter le chantier de Gaffers and Luggers à Mylor Creek Falmouth au Royaume-Uni, une région qui a vu ce type d'embarcation construit depuis plus de deux cents ans. Entièrement équipé à l'intérieur et à l'extérieur, ce ketch de 75 pieds à vendre offre beaucoup pour le prix auquel il est. C'est un bateau de haute mer et prêt à naviguer.Elley Gray es una embarcación tipo piloto Ketch de 75 pies de 2012. Con un solo propietario, se ha mantenido en excelentes condiciones y ofrece comodidad y lujo, perfecta para vivir o viajar por el mundo. Elley fue el último y con 50 toneladas el piloto cutter más grande en abandonar el patio de Gaffers y Luggers en Mylor Creek Falmouth U.K., un área que ha visto este tipo de embarcaciones construidas durante más de doscientos años. Totalmente equipada por dentro y por fuera, este Ketch de 75 pies a la venta ofrece mucho por el precio que tiene. Elley Grey es un barco que navega por el océano y está listo para navegar.
descriptionHtml:
Ketch Pilot house For Sale 2012

The Elley Grey is a stunning 75ft Ketch Pilot House sailing yacht for sale, built in 2012 by Gaffers & Luggers in Mylor Creek, Falmouth, U.K. As the last and the largest pilot cutter from this yard, weighing 50 tons, she is a vessel of historical significance and craftsmanship. With only one owner, this yacht has been meticulously maintained, showcasing luxury and comfort ideal for both living aboard and global voyaging.  She is fully equipped with 2 electric windlass and variable pitch feathering propeller and only 800 h of motor.

The yacht comes fully equipped for ocean sailing, featuring a GRP hull, an Aluminium superstructure, and a teak-deck finish. It offers ample space with a beam of 5.79m, a draft of 2.74m, and an LOA of 22.86m. Inside, the Elley Grey houses five cabins, including an owner's cabin and guest accommodations, all with en-suite facilities, alongside amenities like central heating, air-conditioning, a navigation centre, and a well-equipped galley.

The rigging is a ketch-cutter setup with a wooden mast, electric reefing system, and sails from 2021. Power comes from a Gardner 6LXBM engine with 800 hours, ensuring reliable cruising at speeds up to 9.5 knots. The yacht also includes modern navigational equipment, a 12Kva Northern Lights generator, extensive battery setup, and safety gear.

Overall, the Ketch Pilot house For Sale 2012 represents a unique blend of traditional craftsmanship and modern convenience, making her ready for immediate cruising and comfortable living at sea.

Elley Grey est un beau bateau ketch pilot de 75 pieds Ketch de 2012. Avec un seul propriétaire, il a été maintenu en très bon état et offre confort et luxe, parfait pour vivre ou voyager à travers le monde. Elley a été le dernier  bateau de 50 tonnes  ayant le plus grand pilot cutter à quitter le chantier de Gaffers and Luggers à Mylor Creek Falmouth au Royaume-Uni, une région qui a vu ce type d'embarcation construit depuis plus de deux cents ans. Entièrement équipé à l'intérieur et à l'extérieur, ce ketch de 75 pieds à vendre offre beaucoup pour le prix auquel il est. C'est un bateau de haute mer et prêt à naviguer.

Elley Gray es una embarcación tipo piloto Ketch de 75 pies de 2012. Con un solo propietario, se ha mantenido en excelentes condiciones y ofrece comodidad y lujo, perfecta para vivir o viajar por el mundo. Elley fue el último y con 50 toneladas el  piloto cutter  más grande en abandonar el patio de Gaffers y Luggers en Mylor Creek Falmouth U.K., un área que ha visto este tipo de embarcaciones construidas durante más de doscientos años. Totalmente equipada por dentro y por fuera, este Ketch de 75 pies a la venta ofrece mucho por el precio que tiene. Elley Grey es un barco que navega por el océano y está listo para navegar.
